code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    mut out = ""
    mut current = ""
    mut first = true
    mut i = 0
    let n = string.len(line)
    while i <= n
      mut is_sep = true
      if i < n
        match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(b)
          if b == 32 or b == 9
            is_sep = true
          else
            is_sep = false
          end
        when None
          is_sep = true
        end
      else
        is_sep = true
      end
      if is_sep
        if not string.is_empty(current)
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            let sq = v * v
            if first
              out = "#{sq}"
              first = false
            else
              out = "#{out} #{sq}"
            end
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(b)
          current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        when None
          ()
        end
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(out)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
